use_cases: Navigation links requiring smooth underline animations on hover
CTA buttons or call-to-action links in headers and footers
Inline text links in content sections with visual feedback
ai_summary: A collection of animated link components featuring smooth underline reveal effects that animate from right to left on hover. Built with CSS transitions using cubic-bezier easing for fluid motion. Each variant positions the underline differently (bottom-aligned, below text, etc.) providing flexibility for different design contexts while maintaining a consistent minimalist aesthetic.
